# BalaBite — Your AI Cofounder for restaurants

> You run the place. We do the rest.

BalaBite is the first AI Cofounder for independent restaurants. The brand
operates as a singular presence — the Hebrew ba'al habayit, "the owner
who knows everything" — that shows up every morning and runs the parts of
the business a single human owner cannot get to alone.

## Why the role broke

Running a restaurant used to mean the kitchen and the cash drawer.
Now it's kitchen plus reviews, delivery at 30 percent, marketing, tech,
compliance, vendor wars, catering inquiries, scheduling, payroll, and
a dozen more layers.

The role grew. Nobody opens a restaurant for any of this.

A typical independent restaurant grosses $1M–$2M a year. On the
median 2.8 percent pre-tax margin, that is $28K–$56K in profit,
defended across a dozen-plus software tools that don't fully talk to
each other. The owner is the only integration layer. Alone. And the
math doesn't pay for the team that would carry the rest.

## What BalaBite does

BalaBite runs the rest. Concrete examples from the embedded Miami
kitchen:

- The bok choy you ordered that never showed — reordered before
  Friday's delivery.
- The hurricane on Wednesday — delivery promo pushed before the storm
  killed dine-in.
- The new coffee shop two doors down — pricing benchmarked, slipping
  morning regulars flagged.
- The catering inquiry sitting in your inbox since Monday — quote
  drafted, date held.
- The whiteboard you haven't touched in months — three items off it
  shipped.
- Prime cost drifting 58 → 63 percent — leak found, the fish
  supplier.

While you slept.

## Where it lives

BalaBite sits wherever the real work happens — not just inside the
software. It accepts anything an operator hands it: screenshots,
photos of the broken ice machine, voice memos from the line, the
text from the produce supplier. It reads the staff WhatsApp for 86s
and callouts in real time, watches the whiteboard, the inbox, the
DMs, and the usual data plane (POS, payroll, invoices, reviews).

Sometimes it asks. Mostly it acts.

## Positioning

Their AI lives inside the software. Ours lives in your restaurant.

The product is sold as a partnership, not as software:
- 1 percent of sales (collected via POS integration on day one,
  so the number moves with the restaurant's)
- $299/month floor

When they grow, we grow. Cofounder economics — not vendor pricing.

A typical independent already pays $1,000–$2,500/month for fragmented
tools they only half-use ("the shelfware tax"). BalaBite consolidates
enough of them to be a net budget reduction, and shows up every
morning so it can't be ignored.

## Founder

Lior Brik. Both the engineer and the operator.

**Engineer:** Unit 8200 signals intelligence. Early data engineer at
QuadPay (acquired by Zip, 2020). CTO at a 20-location healthcare group.

**Operator:** Washed dishes at 16. Embedded partner at a Miami
independent restaurant since January 2026. Kitchen, POS, vendors,
payroll — not a visit, a job.

In ~100 days embedded: Toast → Square migration saved ~$1,000/month
recurring (processing + iPad menus + software consolidation), ~$8K
off a merchant cash advance (22% → 15%), in-house procedures + tips
software shipped, inventory built, recipes documented, food
photography upgraded. The partner, before the product shipped.

## How BalaBite is different

Every Toast restaurant gets the same Toast IQ. Every Square seller
gets the same Square AI. Same intelligence, same playbook, for your
competitor next door.

BalaBite is built for one restaurant at a time. Not your competitor's.

- No POS, payments, loyalty, or delivery to defend. Toast can't tell
  you to switch off Toast. Square can't suggest a different
  processor. We can.
- When the morning brief misses something, the engineer who fixes
  it is the same person who reads it. Same day.
- Independents first. That's where the partnership fit is tightest.

## NRA Show 2026

BalaBite is at NRA Show 2026 — Booth 8332, McCormick Place, Chicago,
May 16–19.

Show floor hours: Saturday–Monday 9:30am–5:00pm, Tuesday
9:30am–3:00pm.

Ways to meet:
- **Coffee before the floor** — 30 min, May 16–19, 7:30–9am, off-floor
  café near McCormick. Reserve via balabite.ai/booth-8332.
- **After service** — 45 min, off-floor, right after the show floor
  closes (5:15pm Saturday–Monday, 3:15pm Tuesday).
- **Numbers on the table** — 45 min, after May 20, video call with
  the founder using your restaurant's real numbers. Live demo on
  your data.
- **Booth drive-by** — walk-up, no reservation. Booth 8332 during
  show hours.

All bookings: https://www.balabite.ai/booth-8332

## What we are not

- Not a POS. Toast, Square, and Tabit own the counter. We connect
  to theirs, strategically.
- Not chasing chains. Independents first.
- Not cheap. 1 percent of sales, $299/month floor — because the
  Partner replaces owner thinking, not a spreadsheet.

## Contact

- Website: https://www.balabite.ai
- Email: lior@balabite.ai
- NRA Show booth: 8332 (May 16–19, 2026, McCormick Place, Chicago)
